name: baseline_forecasting
description: Generate statistical baseline demand forecasts using historical sales data without promotional effects
inputs: Historical sales data, seasonality calendars, product master
outputs: Baseline forecast by SKU/store/week, confidence intervals
pain_points: Data quality gaps, intermittent demand, long-tail SKUs, computational scale
kpi: MAPE < 15%, Bias < 5%, Forecast accuracy by segment
data_needed: 2+ years POS data, product hierarchy, store master, calendar

name: promo_uplift
description: Model incremental demand lift from trade promotions, pricing changes, and marketing activities
inputs: Promotion calendar, historical promo data, baseline forecast, trade spend
outputs: Promo uplift factors, adjusted forecast, ROI by promotion type
pain_points: Cannibalization effects, overlapping promotions, new promo types, retailer variations
kpi: Promo lift accuracy, trade spend ROI, incremental units sold
data_needed: Promo event history, sell-through data, spend tracking, competitor promos

name: seasonal_planning
description: Identify and model seasonal demand patterns including holidays, events, and weather impacts
inputs: Multi-year historical sales, holiday calendars, weather data, event schedules
outputs: Seasonal indices, adjusted annual plan, peak demand windows
pain_points: Shifting holidays, climate variability, new markets, short product lifecycles
kpi: Seasonal forecast accuracy, stockout rate during peaks, overstock during troughs
data_needed: 3+ years POS, weather history, event calendars, geo-location data

name: channel_demand
description: Disaggregate total demand across retail, e-commerce, wholesale, and direct-to-consumer channels
inputs: Channel sales history, market share data, distribution agreements
outputs: Channel-level forecasts, channel mix recommendations, distribution plans
pain_points: Channel conflict, data fragmentation across systems, e-commerce volatility
kpi: Channel forecast accuracy, share-of-shelf, on-shelf availability by channel
data_needed: Channel POS, e-commerce clickstream, distributor sell-through, market panel data

name: new_product_forecast
description: Forecast demand for new product launches using analogous product performance and market research
inputs: Analogue product history, launch plans, market research, innovation pipeline
outputs: Launch curve forecast, initial stocking quantities, ramp-up timeline
pain_points: No historical data, analogue selection bias, cannibalisation of existing lines
kpi: Launch accuracy vs plan, days-to-velocity, initial sell-through rate
data_needed: Analogue product trajectories, distribution rollout plan, consumer research surveys

name: forecast_reconciliation
description: Reconcile top-down financial targets with bottom-up statistical forecasts across all planning horizons
inputs: Statistical forecast, financial plan, sales team adjustments, S&OP inputs
outputs: Consensus forecast, reconciliation log, override justifications
pain_points: Political overrides, misaligned incentives, slow reconciliation cycle times
kpi: Bias introduced by overrides, cycle time, consensus achievement rate
data_needed: All forecast layers, financial targets, category plans, regional inputs

name: exception_management
description: Identify and surface forecast anomalies, outliers, and events requiring planner attention
inputs: Current forecast, actuals, alert thresholds, historical variance patterns
outputs: Exception queue, prioritized alerts, recommended actions
pain_points: Alert fatigue, unclear ownership, lack of root cause visibility
kpi: Exception resolution rate, mean time to resolve, false positive rate
data_needed: Real-time POS, forecast vs actual variance, inventory alerts

name: demand_sensing
description: Use near-real-time signals (POS, social, weather) to adjust short-horizon forecasts within the planning cycle
inputs: Daily POS feeds, social media signals, weather forecast, search trends
outputs: Adjusted 2-4 week forecast, signal contribution breakdown
pain_points: Data latency, signal noise, integration complexity, model drift
kpi: Short-horizon MAPE improvement vs statistical baseline, signal freshness
data_needed: Daily/hourly POS, weather APIs, social listening feeds, web analytics

name: reporting
description: Generate standardized demand planning performance reports for stakeholders across the business
inputs: Forecast vs actual data, KPI targets, prior period benchmarks
outputs: Weekly/monthly accuracy dashboards, root cause commentary, trend analysis
pain_points: Manual report building, inconsistent definitions, delayed data availability
kpi: Report timeliness, stakeholder satisfaction, KPI trend direction
data_needed: Forecast archive, actuals, approved KPI definitions, hierarchy master

name: forecast_explanation
description: Provide interpretable explanations for forecast drivers and variance to enable planner trust and override decisions
inputs: Model outputs, feature importance scores, SHAP values, historical actuals
outputs: Driver narrative, top contributing factors, what-if scenario comparisons
pain_points: Black-box ML models, planner distrust, regulatory explainability requirements
kpi: Override rate (lower is better), planner adoption score, explanation accuracy
data_needed: Model artifacts, SHAP outputs, feature metadata, business glossary

name: inventory_optimization
description: Compute optimal inventory targets (safety stock, reorder points, max levels) across the network
inputs: Demand forecast, lead times, service level targets, holding costs
outputs: Optimal inventory targets by SKU/location, safety stock recommendations
pain_points: Lead time variability, demand uncertainty, multi-echelon complexity
kpi: Inventory turns, days of supply, stockout rate, working capital tied up
data_needed: Demand forecast, supplier lead times, cost of holding, service targets

name: replenishment_planning
description: Generate automated replenishment orders based on inventory positions and demand signals
inputs: Current inventory, demand forecast, lead times, order constraints
outputs: Replenishment orders, shipment schedules, supplier alerts
pain_points: Bullwhip effect, supplier unreliability, minimum order quantities
kpi: Order fulfillment rate, lead time adherence, fill rate, OTIF
data_needed: Real-time inventory, PO history, supplier performance, demand signals

name: stock_balancing
description: Reallocate excess inventory across locations to prevent stockouts and reduce write-offs
inputs: Inventory by location, demand forecasts, transfer costs, capacity constraints
outputs: Inter-site transfer recommendations, write-off reduction plan
pain_points: High transfer costs, perishable goods, system integration gaps
kpi: Days of excess inventory, write-off value, transfer cost per unit
data_needed: Warehouse inventory, demand by location, logistics costs, shelf life data

name: supplier_lead_time_prediction
description: Predict supplier delivery lead times using historical PO data and external disruption signals
inputs: PO history, supplier performance data, geopolitical risk feeds
outputs: Lead time distribution forecasts, risk flags, buffer stock recommendations
pain_points: Incomplete supplier data, global disruptions, single-source dependencies
kpi: Lead time forecast accuracy, on-time delivery rate, disruption response time
data_needed: PO receipt history, supplier scorecards, shipping lane data, risk indices

name: network_design
description: Optimize the physical supply chain network — warehouse locations, distribution centers, and flow paths
inputs: Demand by region, facility costs, transportation costs, service level requirements
outputs: Network topology recommendations, cost-to-serve analysis, scenario comparisons
pain_points: Long planning horizons, capital investment decisions, political constraints
kpi: Total logistics cost, service level coverage, network resilience score
data_needed: Demand heatmaps, facility operating costs, freight rates, service zone maps

name: route_optimization
description: Optimize delivery routes for minimum cost, distance, and time while meeting delivery windows
inputs: Order locations, vehicle capacity, time windows, road network data
outputs: Optimized route plans, driver assignments, estimated delivery times
pain_points: Dynamic order additions, traffic variability, driver availability, multi-stop complexity
kpi: Cost per delivery, on-time delivery rate, vehicle utilization, miles driven
data_needed: Order manifest, GPS/map data, vehicle master, delivery window constraints

name: shipment_scheduling
description: Plan outbound shipment schedules to balance carrier capacity, cost, and delivery commitments
inputs: Order book, carrier capacity, freight rates, delivery commitments
outputs: Shipment schedule, carrier assignments, load plans
pain_points: Carrier capacity shortages, rate volatility, last-minute order changes
kpi: Load factor, freight cost per unit, carrier OTIF, shipment consolidation rate
data_needed: Open orders, carrier contracts, rate cards, capacity commitments

name: delivery_tracking
description: Monitor shipment status in real-time and predict delivery exceptions before they occur
inputs: Carrier track-and-trace data, GPS feeds, weather data, historical delay patterns
outputs: Live shipment dashboard, exception alerts, revised ETA predictions
pain_points: Multiple carrier systems, data latency, customer expectation management
kpi: Tracking coverage rate, exception detection lead time, customer complaint rate
data_needed: EDI 214 feeds, carrier APIs, weather API, historical delay data

name: freight_cost_optimization
description: Analyze and optimize freight spend across lanes, carriers, and modes using market intelligence
inputs: Freight invoices, lane data, carrier rates, market benchmarks
outputs: Savings opportunities, carrier negotiation data, mode shift recommendations
pain_points: Rate volatility, invoice errors, limited market visibility, long-term contracts
kpi: Freight cost per unit, savings vs benchmark, carrier performance score
data_needed: Historical invoices, lane volumes, DAT/Spot market rates, contract terms

name: production_planning
description: Create detailed production schedules to meet demand forecasts within capacity constraints
inputs: Demand forecast, machine capacity, raw material availability, labor plans
outputs: Production schedule, resource allocation plan, capacity utilization report
pain_points: Short runs, changeover time, shared resources, last-minute demand changes
kpi: OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness), schedule adherence, output vs plan
data_needed: BOM, routing sheets, machine capacity, demand forecast, raw material inventory

name: batch_scheduling
description: Sequence and schedule production batches to minimize changeover costs and maximize throughput
inputs: Order backlog, batch sizes, changeover matrix, line capacity, allergen constraints
outputs: Optimized batch sequence, changeover schedule, throughput projection
pain_points: Allergen/cleaning constraints, minimum batch sizes, shared ingredients, regulatory holds
kpi: Changeover time, batch success rate, throughput per shift, waste per batch
data_needed: Product families, changeover matrix, line speeds, batch history, quality specs

name: yield_optimization
description: Maximize product yield and minimize waste by analyzing production parameters and process variables
inputs: Process sensor data, recipe parameters, input material quality, yield history
outputs: Optimal process parameters, yield improvement recommendations, waste reduction plan
pain_points: Raw material variability, equipment wear, operator skill variation, seasonal inputs
kpi: Yield %, raw material waste, cost per unit produced, first-pass quality rate
data_needed: Process sensor data, lab results, raw material specs, equipment logs

name: capacity_planning
description: Project long-term capacity requirements and identify gaps requiring capital investment or outsourcing
inputs: Demand plan, current capacity, planned investments, growth projections
outputs: Capacity gap analysis, investment recommendations, make-vs-buy analysis
pain_points: Long equipment lead times, demand uncertainty, CapEx approval cycles
kpi: Capacity utilization, bottleneck identification, CapEx ROI, make/buy cost delta
data_needed: 5-year demand plan, line capacity data, investment pipeline, outsourcing costs

name: predictive_maintenance
description: Predict equipment failures before they occur using sensor data and ML anomaly detection
inputs: IoT sensor data (vibration, temperature, pressure), maintenance history, equipment specs
outputs: Failure predictions with lead time, maintenance work orders, risk priority ranking
pain_points: Sensor data quality, model drift over equipment aging, alert fatigue
kpi: Unplanned downtime reduction, MTBF improvement, false positive rate, maintenance cost
data_needed: Time-series sensor data, equipment master, maintenance log, failure history

name: equipment_monitoring
description: Continuously monitor equipment health indicators and surface anomalies in real time
inputs: Live sensor streams, equipment thresholds, baseline health profiles
outputs: Real-time equipment health dashboard, anomaly alerts, trend reports
pain_points: Legacy equipment without sensors, network connectivity, data storage costs
kpi: Sensor uptime, anomaly detection latency, alert accuracy, coverage rate
data_needed: SCADA/IoT feeds, equipment specs, historical baselines, threshold definitions

name: maintenance_scheduling
description: Optimize preventive and corrective maintenance schedules to minimize production impact
inputs: Maintenance plan, production schedule, technician availability, spare parts inventory
outputs: Optimized maintenance calendar, resource plan, downtime impact estimate
pain_points: Competing priorities with production, technician skill matching, parts availability
kpi: Planned vs reactive maintenance ratio, schedule compliance rate, mean time to repair
data_needed: PM schedules, production calendar, technician rosters, spare parts data

name: spare_parts_optimization
description: Optimize spare parts inventory levels to balance service availability against carrying costs
inputs: Failure probability forecasts, part lead times, equipment criticality, holding costs
outputs: Recommended stocking levels, critical parts list, replenishment triggers
pain_points: Long lead time parts, obsolescence risk, limited storage space, global supply
kpi: Parts availability rate, stockout frequency, inventory carrying cost, obsolescence write-off
data_needed: Parts consumption history, lead times, equipment criticality ratings, cost data

name: shelf_optimization
description: Determine optimal shelf space allocation and product placement to maximize category revenue
inputs: Sales velocity by SKU, shelf dimensions, planogram constraints, shopper flow data
outputs: Recommended planogram, facings by SKU, space-to-sales ratio analysis
pain_points: Retailer compliance, frequent assortment changes, physical measurement accuracy
kpi: Sales per linear foot, out-of-stock rate, planogram compliance rate, velocity improvement
data_needed: POS by store/SKU, shelf dimensions, space management data, shopper behavior

name: product_assortment
description: Optimize product range selection by store cluster to maximize relevance and financial performance
inputs: Product performance data, store demographics, shopper profiles, space constraints
outputs: Recommended assortment by cluster, rationalization candidates, listing priorities
pain_points: Retailer gatekeepers, local demand variation, distribution cost constraints
kpi: Revenue per assortment item, assortment efficiency, delisted SKU impact, distribution coverage
data_needed: Item-level POS, store cluster definitions, shopper demographics, competitor range

name: store_analytics
description: Analyze store-level performance patterns and identify growth opportunities by geography and format
inputs: Store POS, store attributes, market data, competitive intelligence
outputs: Store performance ranking, opportunity map, peer-group benchmarks
pain_points: Inconsistent retailer data formats, geographic data granularity, attribution complexity
kpi: Same-store sales growth, market share by store cluster, store execution score
data_needed: Weekly POS, store attributes, panel market share, retail audit data

name: pricing_optimization
description: Set optimal retail prices by analyzing price elasticity, competitive positioning, and margin targets
inputs: Price history, volume response, competitor prices, margin targets, promotional calendar
outputs: Recommended prices by SKU/channel, elasticity coefficients, scenario P&L
pain_points: Retailer price control, cross-SKU cannibalization, rapid competitor response
kpi: Price index vs competition, volume response, category margin, revenue realization
data_needed: Price point history, volume data, competitor price tracking, margin structure

name: customer_segmentation
description: Cluster customers into behaviorally and demographically distinct segments for targeted marketing
inputs: Transaction history, demographics, behavioral signals, loyalty data
outputs: Customer segments, segment profiles, migration analysis
pain_points: Data privacy regulations, segment drift over time, actionability of segments
kpi: Segment stability, within-segment homogeneity, uplift from targeted campaigns
data_needed: Transaction history, loyalty program data, demographic enrichment, web/app behavior

name: churn_prediction
description: Identify customers at risk of churning and enable proactive retention interventions
inputs: Purchase frequency trends, engagement signals, NPS/survey data, competitor offers
outputs: Churn probability scores, at-risk customer list, intervention recommendations
pain_points: Defining churn for BEV (no subscription), indirect measurement via loyalty data
kpi: Churn rate reduction, retention campaign ROI, model AUC, intervention lead time
data_needed: Purchase history, loyalty engagement, survey responses, redemption data

name: clv_prediction
description: Forecast customer lifetime value to prioritize acquisition spend and retention investments
inputs: Historical purchase data, channel behavior, product adoption patterns
outputs: CLV scores by customer, CLV segments, acquisition cost thresholds
pain_points: Short loyalty membership periods, household vs individual tracking, private label competition
kpi: CLV prediction accuracy, average CLV growth, acquisition ROI, high-value customer retention
data_needed: Full transaction history, loyalty tenure, product mix, channel usage patterns

name: personalization
description: Deliver personalized product recommendations and offers through digital and physical channels
inputs: Customer profiles, purchase history, real-time context, product catalog
outputs: Personalized recommendations, offer triggers, A/B test results
pain_points: Cold start for new customers, consent management, channel coordination
kpi: Click-through rate, offer redemption rate, incremental sales lift, personalization coverage
data_needed: Individual transaction data, email/app engagement, product catalog, consent records

name: campaign_effectiveness
description: Measure and attribute marketing campaign performance using test/control and multi-touch attribution
inputs: Campaign data, media spend, sales uplift, control groups
outputs: Campaign ROI, attribution scores, incrementality measurement
pain_points: Attribution in multi-channel world, long purchase cycles, lack of holdout groups
kpi: Marketing ROI, incremental revenue, cost per acquisition, brand awareness lift
data_needed: Media spend by channel, sales by test/control, campaign exposure data, survey data

name: revenue_forecasting
description: Forecast revenue by product, channel, and geography to support financial planning and investor reporting
inputs: Demand forecast, pricing assumptions, trade spend plan, market share trends
outputs: Revenue forecast P&L, scenario analysis, variance to budget
pain_points: Integration with multiple ERP systems, assumption alignment with commercial teams
kpi: Revenue forecast accuracy, variance to plan, forecast cycle time
data_needed: Demand forecast, price realization history, trade spend actuals, market share data

name: profitability_analysis
description: Analyze profitability by SKU, customer, and channel to identify margin improvement opportunities
inputs: Revenue actuals, COGS breakdown, trade spend, overhead allocations
outputs: P&L by product/customer/channel, margin waterfall, improvement opportunities
pain_points: Overhead allocation methodologies, trade spend net-back complexity, data silos
kpi: Gross margin %, net margin by segment, cost-to-serve by customer, trade spend efficiency
data_needed: SAP/ERP actuals, trade fund system data, cost allocation models, volume data

name: trade_spend_management
description: Plan, execute, and reconcile trade promotion investments against financial targets
inputs: Promo calendar, contracted trade rates, deduction claims, sell-through data
outputs: Trade spend forecast, accrual recommendations, deduction validation
pain_points: Deduction disputes, post-event reconciliation delays, system fragmentation
kpi: Trade spend as % of revenue, deduction accuracy, ROI by event type, accrual accuracy
data_needed: Trade fund contracts, retailer deduction data, sell-through reports, event calendar

name: cashflow_forecasting
description: Forecast operating cash flows to optimize working capital and treasury operations
inputs: Revenue forecast, collection terms, payment schedules, inventory investment plan
outputs: 13-week cash flow forecast, working capital requirements, liquidity alerts
pain_points: Receivables timing uncertainty, cross-border FX complexity, system data gaps
kpi: Cash forecast accuracy, days sales outstanding, days payable outstanding, liquidity headroom
data_needed: AR aging, AP schedule, revenue forecast, inventory plan, bank position data

name: supplier_selection
description: Evaluate and score suppliers using a multi-criteria framework to support sourcing decisions
inputs: Supplier bids, quality audits, financial health data, sustainability scores
outputs: Supplier scorecard, recommended selection, risk-adjusted cost analysis
pain_points: Limited supplier transparency, sustainability data gaps, single-source concentration
kpi: Supplier qualification rate, dual-source coverage, cost competitiveness, sustainability score
data_needed: Supplier financial reports, audit results, cost benchmarks, ESG ratings

name: contract_management
description: Manage supplier contract lifecycle from negotiation through expiry, including compliance tracking
inputs: Contract terms, spend actuals, renewal calendars, compliance audit data
outputs: Contract compliance report, renewal alerts, renegotiation priorities
pain_points: Manual contract repositories, expired terms, lack of spend linkage
kpi: Contract compliance rate, savings vs contracted terms, renewal timeliness, renegotiation cycle time
data_needed: Contract database, purchase orders, invoice actuals, compliance audit records

name: vendor_performance
description: Track and score vendor performance across quality, delivery, cost, and service dimensions
inputs: Delivery records, quality inspection results, invoice accuracy, service interactions
outputs: Vendor scorecards, performance trends, corrective action plans
pain_points: Data collection burden, subjective scoring, vendor pushback on metrics
kpi: OTIF rate, defect rate, invoice accuracy, response time, relationship NPS
data_needed: PO receipts, quality inspection logs, invoice data, service tickets

name: commodity_price_forecasting
description: Forecast commodity input prices to inform hedging strategy and budget planning
inputs: Commodity futures prices, macroeconomic indicators, supply/demand reports
outputs: Price forecasts, hedge recommendations, budget sensitivity analysis
pain_points: Market volatility, geopolitical shocks, model instability in crisis periods
kpi: Forecast MAPE, hedge effectiveness, cost avoidance vs spot, budget accuracy
data_needed: Futures market data, Bloomberg/Reuters feeds, supplier indices, consumption volumes

name: defect_detection
description: Detect product defects in real time during production using computer vision and sensor analytics
inputs: Camera images, spectral data, weight/dimension sensors, product specs
outputs: Defect classifications, rejection signals, defect rate trends
pain_points: Lighting variability, product variation, high throughput speed, model retraining
kpi: Defect detection accuracy, false reject rate, throughput impact, cost of quality
data_needed: Labeled image datasets, sensor readings, product specification files

name: batch_validation
description: Validate production batch compliance against regulatory and internal quality specifications before release
inputs: Lab test results, process parameters, batch records, regulatory thresholds
outputs: Batch release decision, non-conformance report, corrective action triggers
pain_points: Manual review bottlenecks, LIMS integration, regulatory variation by market
kpi: Batch release cycle time, first-pass release rate, non-conformance rate, recall risk score
data_needed: LIMS results, batch manufacturing records, regulatory limits, historical batch data

name: supplier_quality_management
description: Monitor and manage incoming raw material quality from suppliers to prevent production quality failures
inputs: Incoming inspection results, supplier quality history, specification documents
outputs: Supplier quality scorecard, incoming rejection alerts, risk-ranked supplier list
pain_points: Supplier non-disclosure, testing cost and time, limited visibility into sub-suppliers
kpi: Incoming acceptance rate, supplier defect PPM, line stoppages from quality, audit score
data_needed: Incoming QC records, supplier audit reports, specification libraries, field complaint data

name: consumer_complaint_analysis
description: Analyze consumer complaint patterns to identify product quality issues and drive improvement
inputs: Consumer complaint records, product batch codes, social listening data, call center logs
outputs: Complaint cluster analysis, root cause hypotheses, product alert recommendations
pain_points: Unstructured text data, batch traceability gaps, volume vs severity trade-offs
kpi: Complaints per million units, time-to-detect quality event, complaint resolution rate
data_needed: CRM complaint logs, batch traceability data, social media mentions, product returns

name: regulatory_compliance_tracking
description: Monitor product and process compliance against regulatory requirements across all operating markets
inputs: Regulatory frameworks, product formulations, labelling data, market-specific rules
outputs: Compliance status dashboard, gap analysis, remediation action plan
pain_points: Frequent regulatory changes, multi-market complexity, product reformulation costs
kpi: Compliance coverage rate, time-to-remediate, regulatory incident count, penalty avoidance
data_needed: Regulatory databases, product specifications, labelling records, market registration data

name: audit_management
description: Plan, execute, and track internal and external audits to ensure operational and financial compliance
inputs: Audit schedule, prior findings, process documentation, risk assessments
outputs: Audit reports, finding severity ratings, corrective action tracking
pain_points: Resource availability, auditee resistance, finding recurrence, documentation gaps
kpi: Audit completion rate, repeat finding rate, corrective action closure rate, audit cycle time
data_needed: Audit plans, previous reports, SOPs, risk register, corrective action log

name: risk_assessment
description: Identify, quantify, and prioritize enterprise risks across supply chain, operational, and regulatory domains
inputs: Risk registers, operational data, external intelligence, scenario models
outputs: Risk heat map, prioritized risk list, mitigation recommendations
pain_points: Subjectivity in risk scoring, emerging risk identification, cross-functional silos
kpi: Risk coverage %, high-risk mitigation rate, risk event frequency, impact vs mitigation cost
data_needed: Risk event history, process data, external risk feeds, insurance claims data

name: data_governance
description: Establish and enforce data quality standards, lineage tracking, and access controls across enterprise data
inputs: Data quality metrics, data catalog, access logs, lineage metadata
outputs: Data quality scorecard, lineage maps, access violation alerts, remediation backlog
pain_points: Organizational resistance, tool fragmentation, lack of data ownership accountability
kpi: Data quality score, lineage coverage %, policy compliance rate, time-to-resolve data issues
data_needed: Data profiling results, catalog metadata, access logs, master data records

name: esg_reporting
description: Collect, validate, and report Environmental, Social, and Governance metrics for regulatory and investor disclosure
inputs: Energy consumption, waste data, emissions records, social metrics, governance indicators
outputs: ESG scorecard, GHG emissions report, regulatory disclosures, investor materials
pain_points: Data collection from operations, evolving reporting standards (CSRD, SEC), third-party verification
kpi: GHG emissions intensity, water use per unit, diversity metrics, reporting accuracy, audit pass rate
data_needed: Utility data, logistics emissions, waste records, HR diversity data, governance policies
